title: Autonomous loop quality-driven improvement ticket seeding v0
problem: The autonomous researcher loop (ticket-332) completes with observable failure modes in run reports but suppresses golden-covered modes when generating improvement tickets, leaving ticket_ids empty and blocking self-upgrade closure.
acceptance_criteria: Autonomous loop emits at least one actionable draft improvement ticket from observed non-golden failure modes OR documents explicit operator seed path when all modes are golden-covered.
Quality evaluator weakest dimension maps to seeded ticket failure_reason.
Golden tests remain mock-only; no auto-promotion to queue.
rollback_plan: Revert ticket seeding hook; restore golden-covered suppression only.
